history.text: Emirate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Jordan became independent, marking the start of modern sovereign statehood.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Jordan.

worthSeeing.title: Petra:
worthSeeing.text: The rose-red Nabataean city carved into sandstone cliffs, one of the world's great wonders.

worthSeeing.title: Wadi Rum:
worthSeeing.text: Mars-like red desert of sandstone pillars, Bedouin camps, and Lawrence of Arabia history.

worthSeeing.title: Dead Sea:
worthSeeing.text: The lowest point on earth, with therapeutic mineral-rich waters and salt formations.
